subject: feat(duplicates): add semantic duplicate detection via sentence-transformer embeddings
body:
Replace title-based node matching with semantic similarity using all-MiniLM-L6-v2
(Transformers.js/ONNX). Two use cases: smart matching during import and standalone
"Find Duplicates" scanner from burger menu. ~80MB model download is opt-in, cached
by browser Cache API after first use.

New: embeddingWorker, embeddingService, similarityService, useEmbeddingEngine hook,
DuplicateScannerModal. Rewritten: mergeService (semantic matching), ImportModal
(computing-embeddings step), MergeReview (score bars). DB v6 adds embeddings table.

Tags: semantic-duplicates, embeddings, transformers, import, scanner
Complexity: 5
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: semantic-duplicate-detection
Semver: minor
